title: Honkmon
description: A lightweight client modpack for joining the Honkmon Cobblemon server, built to provide a clean, competitive, game-like experience
body:
This modpack is made for the upcoming Honkmon competitive server. The server’s still a WIP and there’s no ETA yet, but once it’s ready, it’ll be added right into this pack.

If you wanna join early, help test stuff, or just hang out while things are being worked on, I’ll have a private Discord link included.

The pack itself is lightweight and meant purely for hopping on the server when it goes live.
